creator: citrin+pr@citrin.ru
text:
Created attachment 176902
update to 0.998

Please update port dns/rbldnsd to latest version: 0.998

While here:
- use ${ETCDIR}
- don't install RPM spec and debian packege spec - they are no use on FreeBSD
- install example zone file with default permissions (readable to all users) there is no need to limit access to examples

Tested on FreeBSD 11 amd64.
